nodes.label: Node ID Format Rule
nodes.rationale: IDs must be derived from the full repo-relative path stem plus entity name, matching what the AST extractor generates, so semantic and structural extraction of the same symbol collide into one node instead of creating orphan ghost-duplicates.

nodes.label: Confidence Score Rubric
nodes.rationale: A discrete rubric of five fixed values (0.95/0.85/0.75/0.65/0.55) was adopted instead of a continuous 0-1 range because production data showed models collapsed continuous guidance into a bimodal distribution (>50% at 0.5, >40% at 0.85+); discrete anchors are easier for models to follow consistently.
